title: Is This AI Fair to You?
modules: What Ethics Actually Means for AI
Transparency and the Right to Know
Ethics in Action: Real Case Studies
synopsis: AI systems make consequential decisions about loans, jobs, healthcare, and news every single day — but who is ensuring those decisions are fair? This beginner-friendly course gives you the practical vocabulary and critical thinking tools to question, evaluate, and advocate around AI ethics in your daily life.
rationale: A demand signal of 7/10 paired with a corpus similarity of only 0.60 against a single advanced 'Ethics Framework' course reveals that accessible, everyday-language ethics education is missing for the general public who most needs it.
